Regarding the appointment of officers...
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department

Madam Cama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032.
Date: 9th April, 2026
Read: -
1) Regulation of transfers and discharge of government duties of Maharashtra Government employees.
The Prevention of Delay Act, 2005.
Government Orders: -
The following table lists the officers who are awaiting appointment to the Naib Tehsildar cadre:
Regulation of transfers of Maharashtra Government employees and in the discharge of government duties.
For administrative reasons, as provided in sections 4 (4) and 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005
In front of his name, Column No. Public with the approval of the competent authorities in the position indicated in section 4.
The posting is being done in the interest of service and administrative convenience.
2. The said order comes into force with immediate effect and the aforesaid officers are in the rank of superintendents.
You have to get involved immediately.

3. The concerned Divisional Commissioner's Office shall forthwith inform the Government by e-mail / post at deske9- rfd@mah.gov.in as to the date on which the officer concerned appeared at the place of new appointment.
Let it be known.
The officer concerned is a Maharashtra Civil Service (Retirement Period, Self-Employment and Suspension, Dismissal).
and the said prescribed under rule 15 of the Provisions for the Period of Removal from Service) Rules, 1981.
As per the provision, it may be noted that the transferor has not joined the position before the expiry of the tenure of office.
Those concerned should note that disciplinary action will be taken against them if they do.
(5) No leave shall be granted to the officers concerned for any reason except with the previous sanction of the Government.
Also, as per Rule 30 (c) of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Leave) Rules, 1981, the original office shall
No leave applications of officers shall be entertained. If such an application is received, it shall be made by the said officers.
Payments must be returned by post to the original address.
table_trans: Vacancy for the post of Naib Tehsildar (Sangayo), Tehsil Office Phaltan, District Satara

para_trans: 6. Since the aforesaid order is being issued with the approval of the competent authority, the appointment of
Temporary posting of Tehsildar or other officers on probation at the level of Divisional Commissioner.
Such officers shall be appointed by the Divisional Commissioner in other vacant posts, if the establishment is so provided by the system.
be given the position.
7. Not joining the office of immediate posting or under any kind of pressure under the said order.
If an attempt is made to cancel the transfer by bringing, this action is governed by the Maharashtra Civil Services (Conduct) Rules 1979.
Being in violation of Rule 23, disciplinary action is taken against them for this misconduct.
It should be noted by all concerned that it will be done.
The Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
